title: BharatBench RAG knowledge-base document
description: Schema for knowledge-base documents the RAG pipeline retrieves from (rag/knowledge_base/*.json). Requires 'source' for the same provenance reason as questions -- a knowledge base of unknown provenance undermines RAG eval credibility just as much as unverified questions do.

text.description: The document/passage content to embed and retrieve.

source.description: Where this document came from (URL, publication, author). Required -- see CONTRIBUTING.md.

placeholder.description: true for scaffolding/example entries only. Must be absent or false for real documents.
